Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" src="/siteassets/logos-and-icons/sf-logo.svg"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Trekk i dagpenger </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Statistiske" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_statistic-slider" name="cookie_cat_statistic" type="checkbox"/>

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Markedsføring" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_marketing-slider" name="cookie_cat_marketing" type="checkbox"/>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (27 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Markedsføring" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_marketing-slider" name="cookie_cat_marketing" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Funksjonelle" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_functional-slider" name="cookie_cat_functional" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Statistiske" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_statistic-slider" name="cookie_cat_statistic" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Markedsføring" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_marketing-slider" name="cookie_cat_marketing" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Skjema for radiac</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Funksjonelle" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_functional-slider" name="cookie_cat_functional" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Statistiske" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_statistic-slider" name="cookie_cat_statistic" type="checkbox"/>

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Markedsføring" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_marketing-slider" name="cookie_cat_marketing" type="checkbox"/>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

<body>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-teaser__heading"> <a class="article-teaser__link" href="/kurs-og-opplaring/sivilforsvarskurs/opplaring-av-mannskap-i-lia-lia-10/">Opplæring av mannskap i LIA (LIA 10)</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Form input has no label

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-teaser__heading"> <a class="article-teaser__link" href="/kurs-og-opplaring/kurs-for-eksterne/samvirke-pa-skadested/">Samvirke på skadested</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-menu" data-initialized="true" data-main-menu="" id="menu"> <h2 class="sr-only">Meny</h2> <button aria-controls="main-menu-items" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne meny" class="ma

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Funksjonelle" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_functional-slider" name="cookie_cat_functional" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Statistiske" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_statistic-slider" name="cookie_cat_statistic" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-labelledby="switch-Markedsføring" class="coi-consent-banner__switch-checkbox" id="switch-cookie_cat_marketing-slider" name="cookie_cat_marketing" type="checkbox"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="Oppdater samtykke" id="Coi-Renew" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="Oppdater samtykke"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://sivilforsvaret.no/nordland
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://sivilforsvaret.no/nordland --max-pages 17 --format html
